zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Mowbray於1192年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，她的父親Nigel de Mowbray46歲，母親Mabel de Clare44歲。她於1214年與Robert De Plumptom在英國越可爾斯波福斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1219年在英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Mowbray于1192年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Nigel de Mowbray46岁，母亲Mabel de Clare44岁。她于1214年与Robert De Plumptom在英国越可爾斯波福斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1219年在英国英格兰越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Mowbray was born in 1192, in Lincolnshire, England, her father, Nigel de Mowbray, was 46 and her mother, Mabel de Clare, was 44. She married Robert De Plumptom in 1214, in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died about 1219, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Mowbray est née en 1192, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Nigel de Mowbray, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Mabel de Clare, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Robert De Plumptom en 1214, à Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1219, à Plumpton by Ecclesall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 28 ans.

ko.Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 c클사

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Mowbray(이)가 1192년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nigel de Mowbray(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel de Clare(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1214년 영국 요르크실르 스포포스에서 Robert De Plumptom(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1219년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 c클사에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Robert De Plumptom em 1214, em Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Mowbray родилась в 1192 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nigel de Mowbray было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel de Clare, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert De Plumptom в 1214 г. в местности споффорт, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла около 1219 г. в местности плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 28 лет.
